I found a calendar event that looks like the dental check-up:

- Title: "Dentist Appointment" (description: "Regular dental check-up.")
- When: 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (1 hour)

Before I reschedule it to 2024-05-20 starting at 10:00 and keep the same 1-hour duration (new time 2024-05-20 10:00 — 11:00), I need two quick clarifications:

1) Is this the correct event to move? (title differs slightly from "Dental check-up" but the description matches.)
2) Please provide the clinic's email address you want notified (the event doesn't currently list the clinic as a participant). Do you want me to add that address to the event participants so they receive the calendar reschedule notification, or would you prefer I send a separate custom email to the clinic? If a custom email, please provide the message to send (or say you want the default calendar notification).

Once you confirm those, I'll proceed.
